summary: solidity-deploy-guard exfiltrates host and environment data to attacker-controlled GitHub Pages endpoint
details: The package's package.json (line 30) and scanner.js contain install-time and runtime code that collects host identifiers (os.hostname(), process.cwd(), whoami via execSync, environment variables) and POSTs them to https://ddjidd564.github.io, an attacker-controlled GitHub Pages endpoint. scanner.js additionally uses child_process and curl to enumerate the host and exfiltrate data via https.request/https.get to the same hardcoded destination. The hardcoded C2 in install-time-reachable code, combined with system reconnaissance (os.hostname, process.env, whoami, fs.existsSync probes of installer paths) and network POST to a non-publisher GitHub Pages account, is an unambiguous credential/host exfiltration fingerprint. Installing this package causes immediate leakage of installer machine identifiers and environment data to the attacker.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
